questionHtml: Outline the reason why PCl5 is a non-polar molecule, while PCl4F is polar.
markschemeHtml:
PCl5 is non-polar:

symmetrical
OR
dipoles cancel ✔

 

PCl4F is polar:

P–Cl has a different bond polarity than P–F ✔

non-symmetrical «dipoles»
OR
dipoles do not cancel ✔


Accept F more electronegative than/different electronegativity to Cl for M2.

meta.title: Outline the reason why PCl5 is a non-polar molecule, while PCl4F is polar.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure
Structure 2.2.6—Molecular polarity depends on both bond polarity and molecular geometry. Deduce the net dipole moment of a molecule or ion by considering bond polarity and molecular geometry.
